mapper.select: SELECT CMM_GROUP_CD AS groupCode, CMM_GROUP_NAME AS groupCodeName FROM CMM_GROUP_CODE ORDER BY CMM_GROUP_SORT_ORDR

SELECT CMM_CD AS code, CMM_CD_NAME AS codeName, CMM_CD_ENG_NAME AS codeEngName, CMM_GROUP_CD AS groupCode, CMM_SORT_ORDR AS sortOrder, CMM_USE_YN AS useYn FROM CMM_CODE
CMM_GROUP_CD = #{groupCode}
ORDER BY
CMM_CD
CMM_CD_NAME
CMM_SORT_ORDR
CMM_GROUP_CD
DESC
ASC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CMM_CD AS code, CMM_CD_NAME AS codeName, CMM_CD_ENG_NAME AS codeEngName, CMM_GROUP_CD AS groupCode, CMM_SORT_ORDR AS sortOrder, CMM_USE_YN AS useYn FROM CMM_CODE ORDER BY CMM_GROUP_CD, CMM_SORT_ORDR

SELECT CMM_CD AS code, CMM_CD_NAME AS codeName, CMM_CD_ENG_NAME AS codeEngName, CMM_GROUP_CD AS groupCode, CMM_SORT_ORDR AS sortOrder, CMM_USE_YN AS useYn FROM CMM_CODE WHERE CMM_GROUP_CD = #{groupCode} ORDER BY CMM_SORT_ORDR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CMM_CODE ( CMM_CD, CMM_CD_NAME, CMM_CD_ENG_NAME, CMM_GROUP_CD, CMM_SORT_ORDR, CMM_USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{codeName}, #{codeEngName}, #{groupCode}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMM_CODE SET CMM_CD_NAME = #{codeName}, CMM_CD_ENG_NAME = #{codeEngName}, CMM_GROUP_CD = #{groupCode}, CMM_SORT_ORDR = #{sortOrder}, CMM_USE_YN = #{useYn} WHERE CMM_CD = #{code}
